mapper.sql: id, name, contact, expected_locations, work_years, education, salary_min, salary_max, skills, project_experience, job_status, update_time, create_time, modify_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resume (name, contact, expected_locations, work_years, education, salary_min, salary_max, skills, project_experience, job_status, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{contact}, #{expectedLocations}, #{workYears}, #{education}, #{salaryMin}, #{salaryMax}, #{skills}, #{projectExperience}, #{jobStatus}, #{updateTime})
